domain: Albanian iso-polyphony (Lab/Tosk regional traditions, UNESCO Intangible Heritage 2005): 3-voice partition lead/follow/isokrate-drone; isokrate (drone) provides frozen pitch; lead and follow voices in phase-lag relationship; per-region microtonal variance; collective-resolution closing cadence at each verse end.
specific_mechanism: ISO-POLYPHONY-3-VOICE-ISOKRATE-LEAD-FOLLOW-LAG-REGIONAL-CADENCE: (1) P_3voice 3-voice partition; (2) B_iso isokrate frozen-drone shared null-space anchor; (3) P_lag paired lead-follow phase-lag; (4) D_regional regional-tuning microtonal variance; (5) C_cadence collective-resolution closing cadence.
llm_application: ISO-POLYPHONY mechanism + P_3voice + B_iso + P_lag + D_regional + C_cadence. Differs from R578/R503/R516/R528/R541/R553/R566. Differs from CLoRA + GaLore + SubTrack + LowRank + OnlineSubspace by 3-voice partition + isokrate frozen anchor + lead-follow lag + regional variance + cadence resolution.
novelty_claim: Low-rank null-space lit broad. ISO-POLYPHONY adds 5-mechanism composite. K=5.
